economic_notes: Bridge River Development Corporation (100% owned) and Bridge River Management LP (99.99% owned) accounted for by modified equity method. Lillooet Salish Enterprises Ltd. 50% owned at cost. BRMLP revenues $1,661,690 and expenses $1,712,519. BRDC revenues $30,291 and expenses $90,319.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Bridge River Development Corporation (100%) and Bridge River Management LP (99.99%). Also holds 50% of Lillooet Salish Enterprises Ltd. at cost. CMHC funding of $1,727,072 is unusually high compared to prior year $113,282 - possibly a large capital contribution. Unrealized change in market value of investments reduced accumulated surplus by $123,118. Long term debt schedule appears cut off in document. current_liabilities calculated as accounts payable $3,439 + deposits received in advance $3,002 + interest payable $1,027 + wages and deductions payable $3,835 + GST payable $64,798 = $76,101 (deferred income excluded as separate line). total_government_transfers includes ISC $3,353,091 + CMHC $1,727,072 + DFO $50,210 + FNHA $729,124 + Additional Government Funding $0 = $5,859,497. osr = $9,594,074 - $5,859,497 = $3,734,577.
